accessories.Name: All-weather floor mats, High Wall

accessories.Name: Splash Guards, Front & Rear
accessories.Description: Protect your Mazda's finish from rocks and other road debris with Mazda's Splash Guards. Front and Rear included.

accessories.Name: Wheel Locks, Chrome
accessories.Description: Help protect your alloy wheels from theft. Unique lug patterns make these locks virtually tamper-proof.

accessories.Name: All-Weather Floor Mats

accessories.Name: Door Sill Protector
accessories.Description: Every entry and exit from your vehicle can expose your vehicle’s doorsills to potential damage from the outside. This set of four Door Sill Protectors can prevent scrapes and scratches.

accessories.Name: All-Weather Floor Mats
accessories.Description: Thick and durable All-Weather Floor Mats provide full protection for your floors with stylish yet rugged metal CX-5 badging. Help keep the great outdoors in its place.
